items.description:
Hi guys, so, this will be my last lab.

The workflow was simple:

local terminal -> terraform plan -> terraform apply

items.title: The Production Problem with Async Dual Writes
items.description: Many "zero-downtime" data migration strategies involving dual writes promise seamless transitions, but often hide insidious data consistency traps. Without careful handling, you're not just moving data; you're silently corrupting or losing it, only to discover the issue months after cutover.

items.title: LLD Foundations: Thinking in Systems (Abstraction + Design Flow)
items.description:
When you start learning Low Level Design, the hardest part is not writing code.

It is figuring out how to think about the system before writing anything.

Most beginners struggle because they try to jump directly into:

  • classes
  • methods
  • APIs

items.title: The TanStack npm Attack Shows Why pnpm 11 Matters
items.description:
On April 28, 2026, pnpm 11 was released with some of the strongest security defaults we've seen from a mainstream JavaScript package manager.

The release follows a wave of npm supply chain attacks, including the recent TanStack compromise and the broader Mini Shai Hulud campaign.
